name: openclawmonitor
description: External monitor and auto-recovery tool for the OpenClaw gateway

scripts.check: npm run build -- --pretty false && node dist/index.js check
scripts.collect: npm run build -- --pretty false && node dist/index.js collect
scripts.dashboard: npm run build -- --pretty false && node dist/index.js dashboard
scripts.report: npm run build -- --pretty false && node dist/index.js report
scripts.service:install: npm run build -- --pretty false && node dist/index.js service install
scripts.service:status: npm run build -- --pretty false && node dist/index.js service status
scripts.service:uninstall: npm run build -- --pretty false && node dist/index.js service uninstall
scripts.start: npm run build -- --pretty false && node dist/index.js watch
